item.title: slint-ui / slint
item.description:
Desc: Slint is a toolkit to efficiently develop fluid graphical user interfaces for any display: embedded devices and desktop applications. We support multiple programming languages, such as Rust, C++ or JavaScript.
Lang: Rust
Star: 4863
